name: Cash Plus
description_short: Cash Plus is a licensed payday and title loan lender with California locations offering fast cash advances, check cashing, and wire transfers. No credit check required for loans.
description_long:
Cash Plus is a multi-location financial services company licensed by the California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation to operate payday loans under the Deferred Deposit Transaction Law and title loans under the California Finance Lenders Law. The company operates franchise locations across California, with the Fullerton store located in the Fullerton Metrocenter at 1317 S. Harbor Blvd.

Cash Plus offers payday loans with same-day or next-day funding (as fast as 15 minutes for account deposit), car title loans for borrowers who own vehicles, check cashing services with competitive rates for payroll checks, and prepaid MasterCard debit cards. The company also provides Western Union wire transfers, money orders, and bill payment services. All services are offered both online and in-store, with bilingual support (English and Spanish).

The company distinguishes itself through rapid funding timelines, no credit check requirements for payday loans, and a full suite of financial services beyond just lending. Their storefront is located in a visible shopping center with nearby anchor retailers (Target, Sprouts, PetSmart, Burger King). Membership in their money order program is free, and members receive free Western Union money orders. The company has established a franchise model with documented success metrics and a franchisee council.

Cash Plus operates in the high-cost short-term lending space. While the Fullerton store posting indicates typical APR examples on a board and in loan agreements, the actual APR and fees are not disclosed on the website. Consumers should be aware that payday loans and title loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional personal loans, and the company's business model depends on short-term, high-fee lending cycles. The lack of transparent APR disclosure upfront is a notable limitation.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available—as fast as 15 minutes for account deposit
No credit check required for payday loans, making it accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Licensed by California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation with full regulatory compliance documented
Extended service hours (open Saturdays 10 AM–3 PM) and convenient location in shopping center with nearby retail anchors
Free Western Union money orders for members with free membership
Multiple funding channels: online payday loans, in-store payday loans, and car title loans
cons: APR and fee information not transparently disclosed on website—must visit store or call to see rates and actual cost
Payday and title loans carry significantly higher costs than personal loans or credit union alternatives, creating debt cycles
Limited to California locations; geographic availability restricted despite franchise model
High-cost lending model means fees and interest rates are substantially above traditional lending products
Title loans require collateral (vehicle ownership), putting vehicle at risk of repossession if loan is not repaid
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who need emergency cash quickly and have no credit access
Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses who need same-day funding and have equity in a car
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who also need check cashing, wire transfer, and money order services
Consumers in California with immediate cash needs who cannot qualify for or access personal loans
diagnosis: Cash Plus is best for unbanked or poor-credit consumers in California facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and have exhausted all other options. Critical caveat: payday and title loans are expensive short-term products with APRs typically 300%+ and high default/rollover risks; consumers should explore credit union payday alternatives (under 36% APR) or employer advances before committing to this option.
services: Payday loans (14-day deferred deposit transactions with no credit check)
Online payday loan applications with rapid funding
In-store payday loans with instant cash
Car title loans (secured by vehicle ownership)
Check cashing services (competitive rates for payroll checks)
Cash Plus Prepaid MasterCard debit cards (loadable at store or Netspend retailers)
Western Union wire transfers (10-minute processing claimed)
Western Union money orders (free for members)
Bill payment services (electronic transmission to most companies)
